description: A web hosting company has three client domains on a shared server. As the sysadmin, use the Virtualmin control panel (https://localhost:10000, login: root / GymAnything123!) to configure the disk quota and monthly bandwidth limits for each virtual server domain. For acmecorp.test, set a 2048 MB disk quota and 10 GB monthly bandwidth limit. For greenleaf.test, set a 1024 MB disk quota and 5 GB monthly bandwidth limit. For craftworks.test, set a 512 MB disk quota and 2 GB monthly bandwidth limit.
